rows.label: qev016001_MSG0001
rows.name: ...You're [ST:playername ], right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0011
rows.name: Honestly reveal that is the case.

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0021
rows.name: Feel suspicious about the sudden question and ask for her name.

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thank goodness. I've
been looking for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Always keeping your guard up,
even around allies... huh.
That's a good mindset, rookie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0004
rows.name: I'm Kirsty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0005
rows.name:
I work as the Operations
Manager for Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0006
rows.name:
Secretary Nagi asked me to give
you a lecture on Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0030
rows.name: Counter

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell her that your training is already finished.

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0040
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0041
rows.name: Show interest in Kirsty's story and listen to what she has to say.

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0007
rows.name:
I hear you went out to install a
Data Probe with Colonel Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0008
rows.name:
But, you can't say you understand everything
about Frontier Net just from that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0009
rows.name:
That's a good mindset. Frontier
Net connects us and Mira[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0010
rows.name:
You won't be able to understand
everything unless you have a
greedy desire to learn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0012
rows.name:
You can install various Data
Probes at Frontier Net Spots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0013
rows.name:
The effects differ depending on the
type of Data Probe, so you need to use
them properly depending on your goal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0014
rows.name:
And by installing the same type of
Data Probe in adjacent spots, you
can obtain even greater effects[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, rather than giving a long
explanation with words, it's better
to actually try it out one by one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0016
rows.name:
Do you remember the Data Probe you
installed in the East Gate Plains before?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0051
rows.name: Say that you remember clearly.

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0060
rows.name: Unknown

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0061
rows.name: Say that you forgot where it was.

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0017
rows.name:
As expected of someone
Secretary Nagi has his eye on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0018
rows.name:
If you want to properly confirm
the location, just look at the
Segment Map on your terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0019
rows.name:
In that case, look at the Segment
Map displayed on your terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0020
rows.name:
The place where you installed the Data
Probe should be brightly displayed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'll tell you two places
connected to the Frontier Net
from the East Gate Plains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0022
rows.name:
First, go to those spots
and plant a Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0023
rows.name:
But just planting them is no good.
You need to change them to the same
type of Data Probe to link them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0105
rows.name:
To swap Data Probes, select the spot
where you installed it on your terminal[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0106
rows.name:
If you choose "Swap Data Probe," you
can pick from the probes on hand.
...What's that? You don't have any?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0107
rows.name:
Here, some Mining Probes. Since
it's your first time, I'll give
them to you as a special present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0108
rows.name:
Your mission this time is to install
Data Probes at two spots and change
all three probes to Mining Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0109
rows.name:
...Well, just try it out anyway.
For this kind of thing, you just
have to get used to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0024
rows.name:
Did you manage to install the
Data Probes at the two Frontier
Net Spots I told you about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Once they're installed, take a look
at the map on your terminal next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0110
rows.name:
The spots where you installed them
will be lit up, so select them and[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0111
rows.name:
All you have to do is choose
"Swap Data Probe" and change it
to the Mining Probe I gave you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0026
rows.name:
Installation of the Data Probes and changing
them to Mining Probes... confirmed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0027
rows.name:
You work fast. As expected of the rookie
Secretary Nagi has high hopes for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0070
rows.name: Pride

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0071
rows.name: Boast that a mission of this level is a piece of cake.

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0080
rows.name: Humility

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0081
rows.name: Humbly accept that it just happened to go well.

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0028
rows.name:
If that wasn't the case, we'd
be in trouble. This is only
the first step, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0029
rows.name:
You must never forget that
feeling. But, it's okay to
have a bit more confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0030
rows.name:
If you switch your terminal's
display to Frontier Net mode...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0112
rows.name:
The three spots marked with red
circles are connected by link lines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0031
rows.name:
This state is a 3-link combo. The effects
of each Data Probe increase by 30%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0032
rows.name:
If 5 Data Probes are linked,
it's a 5-link combo, and the
effects increase by 50%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0033
rows.name:
Furthermore, if you link 8 Data Probes,
you can expect an 80% effect increase![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0034
rows.name:
In other words, by installing the same Data
Probes in nearby spots, you'll be able to
carry out your missions more efficiently.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0035
rows.name:
How is it? That's a link
combo. Did you understand?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0090
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0091
rows.name: Nod, indicating you understood.

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0100
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0101
rows.name: Look troubled, indicating you still don't really get it.

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0036
rows.name:
It's easy to teach an
excellent rookie like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0038
rows.name:
Then don't rush, and try
testing them out one by one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0039
rows.name:
Because there is no such thing
as failure when installing
or swapping Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0040
rows.name:
For now, this concludes
your first mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0041
rows.name:
As a reward, I'll give you a
Research Data Probe as a present.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0042
rows.name:
Next, we'll study this
Research Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0043
rows.name:
This time too, first install a Data Probe
at the Frontier Net Spot I designate[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0044
rows.name:
And from your terminal, change that
Data Probe to a Research Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Also, I'd like you to find an unexplored
territory called the Rock Cavern.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0046
rows.name: I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0047
rows.name:
Install a Data Probe at the Frontier
Net Spot I specified, and then change
it to a Research Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0048
rows.name:
And please discover the unexplored
territory named the Rock Cavern
with your own eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0049
rows.name:
The Rock Cavern... I wonder
what kind of place it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0050
rows.name: Welcome back, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0051
rows.name:
The Rock Cavern[ST:wide ]— It's a very
mystical place, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0052
rows.name:
Everyone in the city seemed to be moved
by seeing the inside of an unknown cave.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0053
rows.name:
...Are you wondering how the people
in the city were able to see the
scenery of the Rock Cavern?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0054
rows.name:
By accessing the Research Data Probe
you installed, the people of NLA are
able to view the accumulated data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0055
rows.name:
For the non-combatants who can't leave
the city walls, that is their sole
means of knowing the outside world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0056
rows.name:
The Data Probes you install aren't
just a means to grasp the future
by discovering Lifepoints.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0057
rows.name:
It's a job that supports the present
lives of the people living in this
city and gives them hope.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0058
rows.name:
How is it? Do you understand
the importance of the work
you'll be doing from now on?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0111
rows.name: Reflect on Kirsty's words and nod.

rows.label: qev016001_JNK0120
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev016001_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask if this generates any personal profit.

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0059
rows.name: You have good eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0060
rows.name:
That's right. If a lot of people
access your Research Data Probes,
you'll receive tourism revenue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0061
rows.name:
A rookie BLADE has a lot of
expenses, right? You should
use it to help cover them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0063
rows.name: Hehe... rest assured.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0064
rows.name:
If a lot of people access your
Research Data Probes, you'll
receive tourism revenue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0065
rows.name:
If you install a lot of Research Data
Probes... you might make a fortune.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0092
rows.name:
...Like this time, if you discover unexplored territories,
you can increase the number of people accessing your
Research Data Probes, so you should keep exploring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0093
rows.name:
Also, something I forgot to
teach you... Oh, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0097
rows.name:
As you install many Data Probes and
proceed with Miranium mining...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0098
rows.name:
I think there will be times
when you reach the maximum
limit of Miranium you can hold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0099
rows.name:
In those cases, you can install a special
Data Probe called a Storage Probe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0100
rows.name:
To increase your maximum Miranium
holding limit and deal with it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0101
rows.name:
As a reward for finding that wonderful
unexplored territory, I'll give you
one of those Storage Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0102
rows.name:
Just like the other Data Probes,
just having a Storage Probe in your
inventory won't have any effect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0104
rows.name:
You have to change it to a Storage
Probe from your terminal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0094
rows.name: ...I've taught you the basics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0095
rows.name:
If there are any missions involving
Frontier Net, I plan to ask you again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev016001_MSG0096
rows.name:
Let's spread our roots all
across this planet Mira![ST:wait ]
